title: varronia bullata subsp. bullata
intro: Varronia bullata subsp. bullata, also known as the African bush bitter or bitter leaf, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Africa and Asia. It is a shrub or small tree with medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant has been found to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Varronia bullata subsp. bullata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a natural remedy in various cultures.
